heading: Monday Night
text: Showers likely far south, mainly late, a rising chance north to Route 4.

heading: Tuesday
text: Showers likely near and south of Route 4, slight chance north to Route 2.
temperature: Lower 70s to mid 80s, south to north

heading: Wednesday
temperature: Low to mid 80s, some upper 80s in the broad valleys west

heading: Thursday
text: Chance of a shower or storm after noon, mainly west.
